title: Pawnee
writer: George Waggner, Louis Vittes, Endre Bohem
actors: George Montgomery, Bill Williams, Lola Albright
plot: Pale Arrow is a white man raised since a boy by the Pawnee Chief. With wagon trains now encroaching on Pawnee land, the Chief sends Pale Arrow to be with the white people. Now known as Paul Fletcher, he takes the job of wagon trai...
